## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code style
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Frontend builds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] New tests added for changed code
- [ ] README updated if needed
